content.body: updated the PR for putting built-in functions in the biblio to include accessors, think it's ready https://github.com/tc39/ecmarkup/pull/676
fun fact: we only have two setters in the spec, and they're both horrible (`Object.prototype.__proto__` and `Iterator.prototype[Symbol.species]`)
